title: coelorachis glandulosa
intro: Coelorachis glandulosa, also known as the glandular Coelorachis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Coelorachis glandulosa include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its use as a traditional remedy for wound healing and digestive issues. Coelorachis glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal purposes.
